reasoning: Both models confirmed critical build/install files (PKGBUILD, patch) are safe. Qwen's inconclusive verdict stems solely from technical limitations reviewing one large JS file, which doesn't execute during AUR build/install. DeepSeek's comprehensive review of 12 files found no risks.
disagreement_analysis: Caused by qwen's context window limit failing to audit one large JS file (bundle.js), while deepseek avoided this file and completed full audit.
coverage_issues: src/opt/vivaldi-snapshot/resources/vivaldi/bundle.js (not reviewed by deepseek; qwen failed due to size)
learnings: Implement file size filtering: Skip files >200KB unless critical to build/install
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install/patches over runtime JS bundles
Add context window warnings: Auto-skip files exceeding model limits
Improve file selection: Weight build scripts higher than app resources
